description: An absent version marker conservatively produces a non-disclosing stale-ruleset result for every claude-code rule; the unrecognized env.DISABLE_TELEMETRY value uses the non-disclosing fallback while cleanupPeriodDays's unset rendering is quoted verbatim (its unset rendering discloses no configured content).

findings.message: Unverified — last-known rule indicates: Effective local session transcript retention window cannot be determined from an unset user-level value because uninspected configuration layers may supply or override it. Observed: cleanupPeriodDays unset in user config.
findings.stale_reason: tool version not detected — no version marker found on PATH
